task_completion.description: Uncheck 'Preserve modification timestamp of file containers' in VeraCrypt Preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Preferences window is open and the checkbox for 'Preserve modification timestamp of file containers' is visibly unchecked.
VeraCrypt main window showing the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc' successfully mounted to a drive slot.

task_completion.description: Copy new_evidence.txt into the mounted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing 'new_evidence.txt' present inside the mounted VeraCrypt volume's directory.
VeraCrypt main window showing the previously used drive slot is now empty, indicating the volume was dismounted.

task_completion.description: Verify the modification time of the evidence_locker.hc file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager properties window or terminal output (e.g., ls -l or stat) showing the current modification time for '/home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the VeraCrypt GUI to change the preference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the VeraCrypt Preferences dialog box being interacted with, rather than direct text editing of Configuration.xml.

integrity.description: The agent did not artificially manipulate the timestamp using the 'touch' command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show the use of 'touch /home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc' to fake the timestamp update.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely copied the evidence file into the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager copy/paste actions or a terminal 'cp' command moving '/home/ga/Documents/new_evidence.txt' to the mount point.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc. Password: Audit2024!. Evidence file to copy: /home/ga/Documents/new_evidence.txt. The VeraCrypt configuration file is located at /home/ga/.config/VeraCrypt/Configuration.xml, where the 'PreserveTimestamp' setting is stored.
